content.text: Generate an image of Microsoft logo.

output.revised_prompt: Create a high-resolution, accurate Microsoft company logo (four-square Microsoft logo). Design: four equal squares arranged in a 2x2 grid with sharp edges and flat, saturated colors. Colors (use these hex values): top-left red #F25022; top-right green #7FBA00; bottom-left blue #00A4EF; bottom-right yellow #FFB900. Style: clean vector-style, no gradients, no text, centered composition, generous clear space around the logo. Output size: 3000x3000 px, PNG with transparent background. Provide the logo with crisp anti-aliased edges and neutral lighting (no heavy shadows).
